title: consolidate GPU tokens, rewrite rotation scripts, clean up stale infra docs
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: One token to rule them all
gist.blurb: We've consolidated our GPU service tokens and swept out some dusty infrastructure docs. Keeping the backend tidy so the hive runs smoother than ever.
gist.summary: Consolidated various GPU service tokens into a single unified token and rewrote our internal rotation scripts for better security and maintainability.
gist.impact: This streamlines our internal deployment processes and makes managing our RunPod and Lambda Labs instances much easier.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, organizing a server rack. The Monitor Robot helping by holding a single, shiny new token, representing the consolidated PLN_GPU_TOKEN.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny toolbelt, organizing a glowing server rack. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds up a single shiny lime green (#ecf874) token. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
